title: Smoky Barbecue Herbs Stir-fry
description: A light Algerian dish featuring a blend of herbs marinated in smoky barbecue sauce, simmered until tender and juicy, making it dairy-free-friendly.
instructions: Wash and slice the aubergine, onion, and tomato into bite-sized pieces.
In a bowl, mix together smoked BBQ sauce with olive oil and herbs (basil leaves, oregano, thyme).
Add salt and pepper to taste. Mix all ingredients evenly over vegetables.
Heat a pan over medium heat, add a bit of olive oil, then pour the marinade mixture into the pan.
Stir-fry until all pieces are coated in sauce and slightly softened. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot as is or with pita bread.
